S.FORM: == palang litep == :ŤÄĀť∑Ļ mitesekay a ngangan:Accipiter virgatus : eagle Igu a ngangan: eagle ÁēĆ:ŚčēÁČ©ÁēĆ Animalia salaadan :salaada aadupan Animalia ťĖÄ:ŤĄäÁīĘŚčēÁČ©ťĖÄ Chordata sacumud :sacumud damiay aadupan Mollusca Á∂Ī:ť≥•Á∂Ī Aves uzip :uzip ayam Gastropoda Áõģ:ť∑ĻŚĹĘÁõģ Accipitriformes mata :mata sunxing Architaenioglossa ÁßĎ:ť∑ĻÁßĎ Accipitridae sapamataan :sapamataan palang Viviparidaesakabenis . palang nu sakakenis han yadah, tinaku sa: da-ban-jiu, tuying,hei-yuan. . palang nu sakakenis han yadah, sun, ying, kuang, jiu, diao, u palang namin ku sausi, ilabu nunika babenisan yadahaca kuni ka babenisan. musakamu tu palag a kawaw palang a kaputan mahicaay kiya ku samataan, katinengan numita han madesay nu aadupen a palang, diao, yao, kuang atu dalu-jiu u palang hanamin a kaputan. palang a sapamataan nu kaputan, caay namin kalecad ku nikaudip, satabakiay atu makatalay nu palangan, idaw ku adidiay nu palangan, idaw ku mukanay tu malahulay nu hecian, tinakusa u yadahay nu tu-ciu , idaw ku mukanay tu ayam, tinaku sa u cue-ying . . idaw ku mukanay tu kiwmaan, tinaku sa u jiao-diao , idaw ku mukanay tu buting, tinaku sa u yu-diao , idaw ku mukanay tu muculilay nu bauan, tinaku sa u she-diao , idaw ku mukanay tu cilekay, tinaku sa u feng-ying , idaw henay ku matatungusay nu kawaan, tinaku sa mukanay tu hecian nu zonglu-jiu atu mukanay tu kacumuli a wo-yuan . palang nu sapamataan mikiayaw kita matineng tunika kenisan siwa ku sakatusa nu sapamataan, idaw ku enem a bataan idaw ku sepat nu mikeliday tusa a lasubu idaw ku siwa nu dumaan a palangan, cidek han nimita idaw ku yuan-ya-ke, ying-ya-ke, diao-ya-ke, kuang-ya-ke, tujiu-ya-ke, pulung han tusa a bataan nu mikeliday sepat a bataan idaw ku enem a masadumaay, caay ka hacica kuni ka laklak. ma'desay nu ayaman, heci ku kanen, u ayam, e'du atu adidiay nu aadupan ku kanen, idaw ku masadumaay manamuh mukan tu kulac, tinaku u tujiu. icelang ku sakubad, matineng mubahel, idemiad a sikawaw. . Diao u tabakiay nu palangan, kibetul tabaki ku udip, sakubad atu banuh nu kikul tanayu' ahebal, nu singpukian a sakubad han mahamaw, itini sa i buyubuyuan mubahel, miadup tu pawalil, wawa nu aadupen nu tabakiay a micucuay nu aadupen ku kanen, mukantu kalabaw. hina adih kitatu jin-diao atu wu-diao. wayway nu hekal palang han nituduan u ayam tu ku sausi. palang han malikat ku mata, itapukuwan henay mubahel makaadihtu isasaay nu aadupen. 100Ťź¨ŚÄč. u palang nu mata i teban idaw ku tusaay nu masalebungay a buhung, mikiyadah tu duma aadupan tu cacaya a mataan, sisa iteban nu mabuhungay anika likatan han makaala tu cacay a ming nu ping-fang-hao-mi kayadah. . pabaw nu sangucud madicem malikawu', sasa nu sangucud han apuyu. sepat ku kanus masineng nu madicemay malikawu' nu kanusan, sakapahay amidakep tu aadupan. u hese namin ku kulit nu udipan, sasa nu banuhan a angangan han u sanglacay ku tungaw atu mahida nu butingay nu kikulan a banuhan, wawa a ayaman han caay katinengi ku banuh nu tungaw atu balakiay a ayaman caay kalecad. kaliwasak nika udip hekal nu kitakit ahebal, mamin nu kitakitan. kitakit nu mitahan kaliwasak han itini i Si-cang, Sin-ciang atu Ney-meng-gu, Cing-hai atu San-si tilul ankang, Sang-luo sa nu Pa-san Mao-lin idaw ku nikaudipan. kananaman nuheni maudip palang han u mukanay tuheciay a kaputan, itida ku yadah nuheni mukan i tepadtepadan nu buyu. palang atu ayam caay kalecad ku kan nuheni, palang han u ma'desay nu mukanay tu hecian, ayam hantu cancanan ku kanen nuheni. kaudipan nuheni makatukuh tu lima a bataan ku mihcaan, kina cacay asiti'kuk han tusa ~lima a ti'kukan, sanglacay ku sasa idaw ku sumanahay nu tungawan, tulu a bataan idaw ku walu a demiadan amatiti' tu wawa, talakaway kunipi sadibu nuheni, palang han kina cacay tusa ~ lima ku ti'kuk, nika nu cacaya a dadibuan han cacay ku malaheciay nu wawaan. dayhiw nu aadupan Ťíľť∑Ļ(Accipiergentilis) . cang-ying (Ťíľť∑Ļ, Accipiergentilis)tada ngangan han u ji-ying anucaay u huang-ying. tamaan nu palangan han tanayu nu udip makaala tu bangkiw a mian, tamaan nu palngan mikiadidi' tu taynaan a palangan, namaka tangah katukuh nu ayawan han u abuabuan ku lumeni a kulitan, nikudan nu mataan han u lumeniay a kulitan, katinengan ku sanglacay nu kalaw a tungawan, sasa han u sanglacay ku kulit, yadah ku malamlamay nu abuabuan lumeniay a adidiay nu tungawan. ,ŚÖąÁęĮŚúď,ŚįĺŤľÉťē∑. taynaan nu palangan pabaw atu hekal nu sakubad u abuabuan hese a kulitan, kalaw han sanglacay nu malamel atu hese a kulitan, sasa u sanglacay a kulitan, sasa idaw ku mabalatay nu tungawan. mabahel satu ku palang, apuyu ku sakubat ahebal, nuayawan mamulmul, tanayu ku kikul. nika cebalan nu sakubat han masa singpuki atu pakunida han masasuala paliyun, patelek sa kunipi bahelan. mabahel satu mahidatu ku wayway, masa singpukiay anika cebalan nu kalamkam han mikikaka tu tabakiay a palangan ku amelik. maledabu i kilakilangan, manamuh midakep tu adidiay a aadupan, tinaku u pawalil atu nuumah a edu', alahican u ayam ku dakepen. pacebaay a pahengaday a kaudipan nu palang pacebaay a kungku' mahinisa: 70ś≠≤. palang i kitakitay nu satanayuay a mihcaan nu ayaman. makaala tu patu a bataan kunika udipan.makatukuh sat utu pituay a bataan nu mihcaan u maekesaytu, hamin hannida mipucpuc ku kubanuh nu udipan, pesengen nuheni ku sangucdm, cacay satu a buladan tahekaltu ku baluhay nu banu atu sangucud, kinacacay aca maudip, pitu tu abataan kuni kaudipan, katukuh tu cacay a lasubu sebat a bataan kuni kaudipan. nananaman numita ku palang . mangalay ahatida kuni kaudip, i sepatay nu mihcaan han amilihida tu saka udiih nidatengan. anu makaala sat utu sepatay a mihcaan sa, u kanus nidi malingatu tu mabaki, caay tu pakadakep tu aadupan. . u sanucud hantu tanayu malikau', midepitu tu baluwan. ahebat satu ku sakubad, tanayu satu ku banuh lumeni' kibetul. ahebed satu mubahel. Sisa tusa ku papilian nuheni cacay han hamawsa mapatay anucaay sa mikingelu' adada tu misabaluhay a dadanan. 150 . cacay a lasubu lima a batan a demiadan amangelu', mapatay mubahel taydan i tunuh nu buyu. itini i tepatepadan sidibu, samuhmuhsa itida caay bahel. palang han sayaway u sangucud kuayaw mituktuk tu ba'tu, katukuh tuni kahetik nu sangucud. samuhmuh satu mihalhal tunika lutucan nu sangucudan. . u baluhay tu asangucud hamaw hannida mingucngus ku kanus mipelu'. mulangaw satu ku baluhay a kanusan, hamaw hantu nida ku banu hacacay hannida mipucpuc. katukuh tu limaay a buladan, mulutuc tu ku banuh, malingatu tu kupalang mubahel. maudip satu kinacacay aca maudip tu tuluay a bataan nuni kaudipan. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan
S.PHON: == par~…ĺaŇč r~…ĺit…ôp == :** mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan:a ¶ ¶ipit…ôr *irgatus : …ôagr~…ĺ…ô igu a ŇčaŇčan: …ôagr~…ĺ…ô *:*** animar~…ĺia sar~…ĺaadan :sar~…ĺaada aadupan animar~…ĺia *:***** ¶ńßordata sa ¶umud :sa ¶umud damiaj aadupan mor~…ĺr~…ĺus ¶a *:** a*…ôs uzip :uzip ajam gastropoda *:*** a ¶ ¶ipitriform…ôs mata :mata sun*iŇč ar ¶ńßita…ôniogr~…ĺossa *:** a ¶ ¶ipitrida…ô sapamataan :sapamataan par~…ĺaŇč *i*iparida…ôsakab…ônis . par~…ĺaŇč nu sakak…ônis ńßan jadańß, tinaku sa: da-ban-jiu, tujiŇč,ńß…ôi-juan. . par~…ĺaŇč nu sakak…ônis ńßan jadańß, sun, jiŇč, kuaŇč, jiu, diao, u par~…ĺaŇč namin ku sausi, ir~…ĺabu nunika bab…ônisan jadańßa ¶a kuni ka bab…ônisan. musakamu tu par~…ĺag a kawaw par~…ĺaŇč a kaputan mańßi ¶aaj kija ku samataan, katin…ôŇčan numita ńßan mad…ôsaj nu aadup…ôn a sakatusa nu sapamataan, idaw ku …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tusa a r~…ĺasubu idaw ku siwa nu dumaan a par~…ĺaŇčan, ¶id…ôk ńßan nimita idaw ku juan-ja-k…ô, jiŇč-ja-k…ô, diao-ja-k…ô, kuaŇč-ja-k…ô, tujiu-ja-k…ô, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan tusa a bataan nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj s…ôpat a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm a masadumaaj, ¶aaj ka ńßa ¶i ¶a kuni ka r~…ĺakr~…ĺak. ma Ē~ °d…ôsaj nu ajaman, ńß…ô ¶i ku kan…ôn, u ajam, …ô Ē~ °du atu adidiaj nu aadupan ku kan…ôn, idaw ku masadumaaj manamuńß mukan tu kur~…ĺa ¶, tinaku u tujiu. i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku sakubad, matin…ôŇč mubańß…ôr~…ĺ, id…ômiad a sikawaw. . diao u tabakiaj nu par~…ĺaŇčan, kib…ôtur~…ĺ tabaki ku udip, sakubad atu banuńß nu kikur~…ĺ tanaju Ē~ ° ańß…ôbar~…ĺ, nu siŇčpukian a sakubad ńßan mańßamaw, itini sa i bujubujuan mubańß…ôr~…ĺ, miadup tu pawar~…ĺir~…ĺ, wawa nu aadup…ôn nu tabakiaj a mi ¶u ¶uaj nu aadup…ôn ku kan…ôn, mukantu kar~…ĺabaw. ńßina adińß kitatu jin-diao atu wu-diao. wajwaj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ par~…ĺaŇč ńßan nituduan u ajam tu ku sausi. par~…ĺaŇč ńßan mar~…ĺikat ku mata, itapukuwan ńß…ônaj mubańß…ôr~…ĺ makaadińßtu isasaaj nu aadup…ôn. *****. u par~…ĺaŇč nu mata i t…ôban idaw ku tusaaj nu masar~…ĺ…ôbuŇčaj a buńßuŇč, mikijadańß tu duma aadupan tu ¶a ¶aja a mataan, sisa it…ôban nu mabuńßuŇčaj anika r~…ĺikatan ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a miŇč nu piŇč-faŇč-ńßao-mi kajadańß. . pabaw nu saŇču ¶ud madi ¶…ôm mar~…ĺikawu Ē~ °, sasa nu saŇču ¶ud ńßan apuju. s…ôpat ku kanus masin…ôŇč nu madi ¶…ômaj mar~…ĺikawu Ē~ ° nu kanusan, sakapańßaj amidak…ôp tu aadupan. u ńß…ôs…ô namin ku kur~…ĺit nu udipan, sasa nu banuńßan a aŇčaŇčan ńßan u saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj ku tuŇčaw atu mańßida nu butiŇčaj nu kikur~…ĺan a banuńßan, wawa a ajaman ńßan ¶aaj katin…ôŇči ku banuńß nu tuŇčaw atu bar~…ĺakiaj a ajaman ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. kar~…ĺiwasak nika udip ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu kitakit ańß…ôbar~…ĺ, mamin nu kitakitan. kitakit nu mitańßan kar~…ĺiwasak ńßan itini i si- ¶aŇč, sin- ¶iaŇč atu n…ô-m…ôŇč-gu, ¶iŇč-ńßai atu san-si tir~…ĺur~…ĺ ankaŇč, saŇč-r~…ĺuo sa nu pa-san mao-r~…ĺin idaw ku nikaudipan. kananaman nuńß…ôni maudip par~…ĺaŇč ńßan u mukanaj tuńß…ô ¶iaj a kaputan, itida ku jadańß nuńß…ôni mukan i t…ôpadt…ôpadan nu buju. par~…ĺaŇč atu ajam ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kan nuńß…ôni, par~…ĺaŇč ńßan u ma Ē~ °d…ôsaj nu mukanaj tu ńß…ô ¶ian, ajam ńßantu ¶an ¶anan ku kan…ôn nuńß…ôni. kaudipan nuńß…ôni makatukuńß tu r~…ĺima a bataan ku mińß ¶aan, kina ¶a ¶aj asiti Ē~ °kuk ńßan tusa ~r~…ĺima a ti Ē~ °kukan, saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj ku sasa idaw ku sumanańßaj nu tuŇčawan, tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu a d…ômiadan amatiti Ē~ ° tu wawa, tar~…ĺakawaj kunipi sadibu nuńß…ôni, par~…ĺaŇč ńßan kina ¶a ¶aj tusa ~ r~…ĺima ku ti Ē~ °kuk, nika nu ¶a ¶aja a dadibuan ńßan ¶a ¶aj ku mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj nu wawaan. dajńßiw nu aadupan **(a ¶ ¶ipi…ôrg…ôntir~…ĺis) . ¶aŇč-jiŇč (**, a ¶ ¶ipi…ôrg…ôntir~…ĺis)tada ŇčaŇčan ńßan u ji-jiŇč anu ¶aaj u ńßuaŇč-jiŇč. tamaan nu par~…ĺaŇčan ńßan tanaju nu udip makaar~…ĺa tu baŇčkiw a mian, tamaan nu par~…ĺŇčan mikiadidi Ē~ ° tu tajnaan a par~…ĺaŇčan, namaka taŇčańß katukuńß nu ajawan ńßan u abuabuan ku r~…ĺum…ôni a kur~…ĺitan, nikudan nu mataan ńßan u r~…ĺum…ôniaj a kur~…ĺitan, katin…ôŇčan ku saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj nu kar~…ĺaw a tuŇčawan, sasa ńßan u saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj ku kur~…ĺit, jadańß ku mar~…ĺamr~…ĺamaj nu abuabuan r~…ĺum…ôniaj a adidiaj nu tuŇčawan. ,***,***. tajnaan nu par~…ĺaŇčan pabaw atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu sakubad u abuabuan ńß…ôs…ô a kur~…ĺitan, kar~…ĺaw ńßan saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj nu mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ atu ńß…ôs…ô a kur~…ĺitan, sasa u saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a kur~…ĺitan, sasa idaw ku mabar~…ĺataj nu tuŇčawan. mabańß…ôr~…ĺ satu ku par~…ĺaŇč, apuju ku sakubat ańß…ôbar~…ĺ, nuajawan mamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, tanaju ku kikur~…ĺ. nika ¶…ôbar~…ĺan nu sakubat ńßan masa siŇčpuki atu pakunida ńßan masasuar~…ĺa par~…ĺijun, pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk sa kunipi bańß…ôr~…ĺan. mabańß…ôr~…ĺ satu mańßidatu ku wajwaj, masa siŇčpukiaj anika ¶…ôbar~…ĺan nu kar~…ĺamkam ńßan mikikaka tu tabakiaj a par~…ĺaŇčan ku am…ôr~…ĺik. mar~…ĺ…ôdabu i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, manamuńß midak…ôp tu adidiaj a aadupan, tinaku u pawar~…ĺir~…ĺ atu nuumańß a …ôdu Ē~ °, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an u ajam ku dak…ôp…ôn. pa ¶…ôbaaj a pańß…ôŇčadaj a kaudipan nu par~…ĺaŇč pa ¶…ôbaaj a kuŇčku Ē~ ° mańßinisa: ***. par~…ĺaŇč i kitakitaj nu satanajuaj a mińß ¶aan nu ajaman. makaar~…ĺa tu patu a bataan kunika udipan.makatukuńß sat utu pituaj a bataan nu mińß ¶aan u ma…ôk…ôsajtu, ńßamin ńßannida mipu ¶pu ¶ ku kubanuńß nu udipan, p…ôs…ôŇč…ôn nuńß…ôni ku saŇču ¶dm, ¶a ¶aj satu a bur~…ĺadan tańß…ôkar~…ĺtu ku bar~…ĺuńßaj nu banu atu saŇču ¶ud, kina ¶a ¶aj a ¶a maudip, pitu tu abataan kuni kaudipan, katukuńß tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu s…ôbat a bataan kuni kaudipan. nananaman numita ku par~…ĺaŇč . maŇčar~…ĺaj ańßatida kuni kaudip, i s…ôpataj nu mińß ¶aan ńßan amir~…ĺińßida tu saka udiińß nidat…ôŇčan. anu makaar~…ĺa sat utu s…ôpataj a mińß ¶aan sa, u kanus nidi mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mabaki, ¶aaj tu pakadak…ôp tu aadupan. . u sanu ¶ud ńßantu tanaju mar~…ĺikau Ē~ °, mid…ôpitu tu bar~…ĺuwan. ańß…ôbat satu ku sakubad, tanaju satu ku banuńß r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° kib…ôtur~…ĺ. ańß…ôb…ôd satu mubańß…ôr~…ĺ. sisa tusa ku papir~…ĺian nuńß…ôni ¶a ¶aj ńßan ńßamawsa mapataj anu ¶aaj sa mikiŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° adada tu misabar~…ĺuńßaj a dadanan. *** . ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a batan a d…ômiadan amaŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °, mapataj mubańß…ôr~…ĺ tajdan i tunuńß nu buju. itini i t…ôpat…ôpadan sidibu, samuńßmuńßsa itida ¶aaj bańß…ôr~…ĺ. par~…ĺaŇč ńßan sajawaj u saŇču ¶ud kuajaw mituktuk tu ba Ē~ °tu, katukuńß tuni kańß…ôtik nu saŇču ¶ud. samuńßmuńß satu mińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ tunika r~…ĺutu ¶an nu saŇču ¶udan. . u bar~…ĺuńßaj tu asaŇču ¶ud ńßamaw ńßannida miŇču ¶Ňčus ku kanus mip…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °. mur~…ĺaŇčaw satu ku bar~…ĺuńßaj a kanusan, ńßamaw ńßantu nida ku banu ńßa ¶a ¶aj ńßannida mipu ¶pu ¶. katukuńß tu r~…ĺimaaj a bur~…ĺadan, mur~…ĺutu ¶ tu ku banuńß, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu kupar~…ĺaŇč mubańß…ôr~…ĺ. maudip satu kina ¶a ¶aj a ¶a maudip tu tur~…ĺuaj a bataan nuni kaudipan. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == palang litep == :ŤÄĀť∑Ļ mitesekay a ngangan:Accipiter virgatus : eagle Igu a ngangan: eagle ÁēĆ:ŚčēÁČ©ÁēĆ Animalia salaadan :salaada aadupan Animalia ťĖÄ:ŤĄäÁīĘŚčēÁČ©ťĖÄ Chordata sacumud :sacumud damiay aadupan Mollusca Á∂Ī:ť≥•Á∂Ī Aves uzip :uzip ayam Gastropoda Áõģ:ť∑ĻŚĹĘÁõģ Accipitriformes mata :mata sunxing Architaenioglossa ÁßĎ:ť∑ĻÁßĎ Accipitridae sapamataan :sapamataan palang Viviparidaesakabenis . palang nu sakakenis han yadah, tinaku sa: da-ban-jiu, tuying,hei-yuan. . palang nu sakakenis han yadah, sun, ying, kuang, jiu, diao, u palang namin ku sausi, ilabu nunika babenisan yadahaca kuni ka babenisan. musakamu tu palag a kawaw palang a kaputan mahicaay kiya ku samataan, katinengan numita han madesay nu aadupen a palang, diao, yao, kuang atu dalu-jiu u palang hanamin a kaputan. palang a sapamataan nu kaputan, caay namin kalecad ku nikaudip, satabakiay atu makatalay nu palangan, idaw ku adidiay nu palangan, idaw ku mukanay tu malahulay nu hecian, tinakusa u yadahay nu tu-ciu , idaw ku mukanay tu ayam, tinaku sa u cue-ying . . idaw ku mukanay tu kiwmaan, tinaku sa u jiao-diao , idaw ku mukanay tu buting, tinaku sa u yu-diao , idaw ku mukanay tu muculilay nu bauan, tinaku sa u she-diao , idaw ku mukanay tu cilekay, tinaku sa u feng-ying , idaw henay ku matatungusay nu kawaan, tinaku sa mukanay tu hecian nu zonglu-jiu atu mukanay tu kacumuli a wo-yuan . palang nu sapamataan mikiayaw kita matineng tunika kenisan siwa ku sakatusa nu sapamataan, idaw ku enem a bataan idaw ku sepat nu mikeliday tusa a lasubu idaw ku siwa nu dumaan a palangan, cidek han nimita idaw ku yuan-ya-ke, ying-ya-ke, diao-ya-ke, kuang-ya-ke, tujiu-ya-ke, pulung han tusa a bataan nu mikeliday sepat a bataan idaw ku enem a masadumaay, caay ka hacica kuni ka laklak. ma'desay nu ayaman, heci ku kanen, u ayam, e'du atu adidiay nu aadupan ku kanen, idaw ku masadumaay manamuh mukan tu kulac, tinaku u tujiu. icelang ku sakubad, matineng mubahel, idemiad a sikawaw. . Diao u tabakiay nu palangan, kibetul tabaki ku udip, sakubad atu banuh nu kikul tanayu' ahebal, nu singpukian a sakubad han mahamaw, itini sa i buyubuyuan mubahel, miadup tu pawalil, wawa nu aadupen nu tabakiay a micucuay nu aadupen ku kanen, mukantu kalabaw. hina adih kitatu jin-diao atu wu-diao. wayway nu hekal palang han nituduan u ayam tu ku sausi. palang han malikat ku mata, itapukuwan henay mubahel makaadihtu isasaay nu aadupen. 100Ťź¨ŚÄč. u palang nu mata i teban idaw ku tusaay nu masalebungay a buhung, mikiyadah tu duma aadupan tu cacaya a mataan, sisa iteban nu mabuhungay anika likatan han makaala tu cacay a ming nu ping-fang-hao-mi kayadah. . pabaw nu sangucud madicem malikawu', sasa nu sangucud han apuyu. sepat ku kanus masineng nu madicemay malikawu' nu kanusan, sakapahay amidakep tu aadupan. u hese namin ku kulit nu udipan, sasa nu banuhan a angangan han u sanglacay ku tungaw atu mahida nu butingay nu kikulan a banuhan, wawa a ayaman han caay katinengi ku banuh nu tungaw atu balakiay a ayaman caay kalecad. kaliwasak nika udip hekal nu kitakit ahebal, mamin nu kitakitan. kitakit nu mitahan kaliwasak han itini i Si-cang, Sin-ciang atu Ney-meng-gu, Cing-hai atu San-si tilul ankang, Sang-luo sa nu Pa-san Mao-lin idaw ku nikaudipan. kananaman nuheni maudip palang han u mukanay tuheciay a kaputan, itida ku yadah nuheni mukan i tepadtepadan nu buyu. palang atu ayam caay kalecad ku kan nuheni, palang han u ma'desay nu mukanay tu hecian, ayam hantu cancanan ku kanen nuheni. kaudipan nuheni makatukuh tu lima a bataan ku mihcaan, kina cacay asiti'kuk han tusa ~lima a ti'kukan, sanglacay ku sasa idaw ku sumanahay nu tungawan, tulu a bataan idaw ku walu a demiadan amatiti' tu wawa, talakaway kunipi sadibu nuheni, palang han kina cacay tusa ~ lima ku ti'kuk, nika nu cacaya a dadibuan han cacay ku malaheciay nu wawaan. dayhiw nu aadupan Ťíľť∑Ļ(Accipiergentilis) . cang-ying (Ťíľť∑Ļ, Accipiergentilis)tada ngangan han u ji-ying anucaay u huang-ying. tamaan nu palangan han tanayu nu udip makaala tu bangkiw a mian, tamaan nu palngan mikiadidi' tu taynaan a palangan, namaka tangah katukuh nu ayawan han u abuabuan ku lumeni a kulitan, nikudan nu mataan han u lumeniay a kulitan, katinengan ku sanglacay nu kalaw a tungawan, sasa han u sanglacay ku kulit, yadah ku malamlamay nu abuabuan lumeniay a adidiay nu tungawan. ,ŚÖąÁęĮŚúď,ŚįĺŤľÉťē∑. taynaan nu palangan pabaw atu hekal nu sakubad u abuabuan hese a kulitan, kalaw han sanglacay nu malamel atu hese a kulitan, sasa u sanglacay a kulitan, sasa idaw ku mabalatay nu tungawan. mabahel satu ku palang, apuyu ku sakubat ahebal, nuayawan mamulmul, tanayu ku kikul. nika cebalan nu sakubat han masa singpuki atu pakunida han masasuala paliyun, patelek sa kunipi bahelan. mabahel satu mahidatu ku wayway, masa singpukiay anika cebalan nu kalamkam han mikikaka tu tabakiay a palangan ku amelik. maledabu i kilakilangan, manamuh midakep tu adidiay a aadupan, tinaku u pawalil atu nuumah a edu', alahican u ayam ku dakepen. pacebaay a pahengaday a kaudipan nu palang pacebaay a kungku' mahinisa: 70ś≠≤. palang i kitakitay nu satanayuay a mihcaan nu ayaman. makaala tu patu a bataan kunika udipan.makatukuh sat utu pituay a bataan nu mihcaan u maekesaytu, hamin hannida mipucpuc ku kubanuh nu udipan, pesengen nuheni ku sangucdm, cacay satu a buladan tahekaltu ku baluhay nu banu atu sangucud, kinacacay aca maudip, pitu tu abataan kuni kaudipan, katukuh tu cacay a lasubu sebat a bataan kuni kaudipan. nananaman numita ku palang . mangalay ahatida kuni kaudip, i sepatay nu mihcaan han amilihida tu saka udiih nidatengan. anu makaala sat utu sepatay a mihcaan sa, u kanus nidi malingatu tu mabaki, caay tu pakadakep tu aadupan. . u sanucud hantu tanayu malikau', midepitu tu baluwan. ahebat satu ku sakubad, tanayu satu ku banuh lumeni' kibetul. ahebed satu mubahel. Sisa tusa ku papilian nuheni cacay han hamawsa mapatay anucaay sa mikingelu' adada tu misabaluhay a dadanan. 150 . cacay a lasubu lima a batan a demiadan amangelu', mapatay mubahel taydan i tunuh nu buyu. itini i tepatepadan sidibu, samuhmuhsa itida caay bahel. palang han sayaway u sangucud kuayaw mituktuk tu ba'tu, katukuh tuni kahetik nu sangucud. samuhmuh satu mihalhal tunika lutucan nu sangucudan. . u baluhay tu asangucud hamaw hannida mingucngus ku kanus mipelu'. mulangaw satu ku baluhay a kanusan, hamaw hantu nida ku banu hacacay hannida mipucpuc. katukuh tu limaay a buladan, mulutuc tu ku banuh, malingatu tu kupalang mubahel. maudip satu kinacacay aca maudip tu tuluay a bataan nuni kaudipan. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan
S.PHON: == par~…ĺaŇč r~…ĺit…ôp == :** mit…ôs…ôkaj a ŇčaŇčan:a ¶ ¶ipit…ôr *irgatus : …ôagr~…ĺ…ô igu a ŇčaŇčan: …ôagr~…ĺ…ô *:*** animar~…ĺia sar~…ĺaadan :sar~…ĺaada aadupan animar~…ĺia *:***** ¶ńßordata sa ¶umud :sa ¶umud damiaj aadupan mor~…ĺr~…ĺus ¶a *:** a*…ôs uzip :uzip ajam gastropoda *:*** a ¶ ¶ipitriform…ôs mata :mata sun*iŇč ar ¶ńßita…ôniogr~…ĺossa *:** a ¶ ¶ipitrida…ô sapamataan :sapamataan par~…ĺaŇč *i*iparida…ôsakab…ônis . par~…ĺaŇč nu sakak…ônis ńßan jadańß, tinaku sa: da-ban-jiu, tujiŇč,ńß…ôi-juan. . par~…ĺaŇč nu sakak…ônis ńßan jadańß, sun, jiŇč, kuaŇč, jiu, diao, u par~…ĺaŇč namin ku sausi, ir~…ĺabu nunika bab…ônisan jadańßa ¶a kuni ka bab…ônisan. musakamu tu par~…ĺag a kawaw par~…ĺaŇč a kaputan mańßi ¶aaj kija ku samataan, katin…ôŇčan numita ńßan mad…ôsaj nu aadup…ôn a kuaŇč-ja-k…ô, tujiu-ja-k…ô, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan tusa a bataan nu mik…ôr~…ĺidaj s…ôpat a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm a masadumaaj, ¶aaj ka ńßa ¶i ¶a kuni ka r~…ĺakr~…ĺak. ma Ē~ °d…ôsaj nu ajaman, ńß…ô ¶i ku kan…ôn, u ajam, …ô Ē~ °du atu adidiaj nu aadupan ku kan…ôn, idaw ku masadumaaj manamuńß mukan tu kur~…ĺa ¶, tinaku u tujiu. i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku sakubad, matin…ôŇč mubańß…ôr~…ĺ, id…ômiad a sikawaw. . diao u tabakiaj nu par~…ĺaŇčan, kib…ôtur~…ĺ tabaki ku udip, sakubad atu banuńß nu kikur~…ĺ tanaju Ē~ ° ańß…ôbar~…ĺ, nu siŇčpukian a sakubad ńßan mańßamaw, itini sa i bujubujuan mubańß…ôr~…ĺ, miadup tu pawar~…ĺir~…ĺ, wawa nu aadup…ôn nu tabakiaj a mi ¶u ¶uaj nu aadup…ôn ku kan…ôn, mukantu kar~…ĺabaw. ńßina adińß kitatu jin-diao atu wu-diao. wajwaj nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ par~…ĺaŇč ńßan nituduan u ajam tu ku sausi. par~…ĺaŇč ńßan mar~…ĺikat ku mata, itapukuwan ńß…ônaj mubańß…ôr~…ĺ makaadińßtu isasaaj nu aadup…ôn. *****. u par~…ĺaŇč nu mata i t…ôban idaw ku tusaaj nu masar~…ĺ…ôbuŇčaj a buńßuŇč, mikijadańß tu duma aadupan tu ¶a ¶aja a mataan, sisa it…ôban nu mabuńßuŇčaj anika r~…ĺikatan ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶a ¶aj a miŇč nu piŇč-faŇč-ńßao-mi kajadańß. . pabaw nu saŇču ¶ud madi ¶…ôm mar~…ĺikawu Ē~ °, sasa nu saŇču ¶ud ńßan apuju. s…ôpat ku kanus masin…ôŇč nu madi ¶…ômaj mar~…ĺikawu Ē~ ° nu kanusan, sakapańßaj amidak…ôp tu aadupan. u ńß…ôs…ô namin ku kur~…ĺit nu udipan, sasa nu banuńßan a aŇčaŇčan ńßan u saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj ku tuŇčaw atu mańßida nu butiŇčaj nu kikur~…ĺan a banuńßan, wawa a ajaman ńßan ¶aaj katin…ôŇči ku banuńß nu tuŇčaw atu bar~…ĺakiaj a ajaman ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. kar~…ĺiwasak nika udip ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu kitakit ańß…ôbar~…ĺ, mamin nu kitakitan. kitakit nu mitańßan kar~…ĺiwasak ńßan itini i si- ¶aŇč, sin- ¶iaŇč atu n…ô-m…ôŇč-gu, ¶iŇč-ńßai atu san-si tir~…ĺur~…ĺ ankaŇč, saŇč-r~…ĺuo sa nu pa-san mao-r~…ĺin idaw ku nikaudipan. kananaman nuńß…ôni maudip par~…ĺaŇč ńßan u mukanaj tuńß…ô ¶iaj a kaputan, itida ku jadańß nuńß…ôni mukan i t…ôpadt…ôpadan nu buju. par~…ĺaŇč atu ajam ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku kan nuńß…ôni, par~…ĺaŇč ńßan u ma Ē~ °d…ôsaj nu mukanaj tu ńß…ô ¶ian, ajam ńßantu ¶an ¶anan ku kan…ôn nuńß…ôni. kaudipan nuńß…ôni makatukuńß tu r~…ĺima a bataan ku mińß ¶aan, kina ¶a ¶aj asiti Ē~ °kuk ńßan tusa ~r~…ĺima a ti Ē~ °kukan, saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj ku sasa idaw ku sumanańßaj nu tuŇčawan, tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu a d…ômiadan amatiti Ē~ ° tu wawa, tar~…ĺakawaj kunipi sadibu nuńß…ôni, par~…ĺaŇč ńßan kina ¶a ¶aj tusa ~ r~…ĺima ku ti Ē~ °kuk, nika nu ¶a ¶aja a dadibuan ńßan ¶a ¶aj ku mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj nu wawaan. dajńßiw nu aadupan **(a ¶ ¶ipi…ôrg…ôntir~…ĺis) . ¶aŇč-jiŇč (**, a ¶ ¶ipi…ôrg…ôntir~…ĺis)tada ŇčaŇčan ńßan u ji-jiŇč anu ¶aaj u ńßuaŇč-jiŇč. tamaan nu par~…ĺaŇčan ńßan tanaju nu udip makaar~…ĺa tu baŇčkiw a mian, tamaan nu par~…ĺŇčan mikiadidi Ē~ ° tu tajnaan a par~…ĺaŇčan, namaka taŇčańß katukuńß nu ajawan ńßan u abuabuan ku r~…ĺum…ôni a kur~…ĺitan, nikudan nu mataan ńßan u r~…ĺum…ôniaj a kur~…ĺitan, katin…ôŇčan ku saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj nu kar~…ĺaw a tuŇčawan, sasa ńßan u saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj ku kur~…ĺit, jadańß ku mar~…ĺamr~…ĺamaj nu abuabuan r~…ĺum…ôniaj a adidiaj nu tuŇčawan. ,***,***. tajnaan nu par~…ĺaŇčan pabaw atu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu sakubad u abuabuan ńß…ôs…ô a kur~…ĺitan, kar~…ĺaw ńßan saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj nu mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ atu ńß…ôs…ô a kur~…ĺitan, sasa u saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a kur~…ĺitan, sasa idaw ku mabar~…ĺataj nu tuŇčawan. mabańß…ôr~…ĺ satu ku par~…ĺaŇč, apuju ku sakubat ańß…ôbar~…ĺ, nuajawan mamur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, tanaju ku kikur~…ĺ. nika ¶…ôbar~…ĺan nu sakubat ńßan masa siŇčpuki atu pakunida ńßan masasuar~…ĺa par~…ĺijun, pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk sa kunipi bańß…ôr~…ĺan. mabańß…ôr~…ĺ satu mańßidatu ku wajwaj, masa siŇčpukiaj anika ¶…ôbar~…ĺan nu kar~…ĺamkam ńßan mikikaka tu tabakiaj a par~…ĺaŇčan ku am…ôr~…ĺik. mar~…ĺ…ôdabu i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, manamuńß midak…ôp tu adidiaj a aadupan, tinaku u pawar~…ĺir~…ĺ atu nuumańß a …ôdu Ē~ °, ar~…ĺańßi ¶an u ajam ku dak…ôp…ôn. pa ¶…ôbaaj a pańß…ôŇčadaj a kaudipan nu par~…ĺaŇč pa ¶…ôbaaj a kuŇčku Ē~ ° mańßinisa: ***. par~…ĺaŇč i kitakitaj nu satanajuaj a mińß ¶aan nu ajaman. makaar~…ĺa tu patu a bataan kunika udipan.makatukuńß sat utu pituaj a bataan nu mińß ¶aan u ma…ôk…ôsajtu, ńßamin ńßannida mipu ¶pu ¶ ku kubanuńß nu udipan, p…ôs…ôŇč…ôn nuńß…ôni ku saŇču ¶dm, ¶a ¶aj satu a bur~…ĺadan tańß…ôkar~…ĺtu ku bar~…ĺuńßaj nu banu atu saŇču ¶ud, kina ¶a ¶aj a ¶a maudip, pitu tu abataan kuni kaudipan, katukuńß tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu s…ôbat a bataan kuni kaudipan. nananaman numita ku par~…ĺaŇč . maŇčar~…ĺaj ańßatida kuni kaudip, i s…ôpataj nu mińß ¶aan ńßan amir~…ĺińßida tu saka udiińß nidat…ôŇčan. anu makaar~…ĺa sat utu s…ôpataj a mińß ¶aan sa, u kanus nidi mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mabaki, ¶aaj tu pakadak…ôp tu aadupan. . u sanu ¶ud ńßantu tanaju mar~…ĺikau Ē~ °, mid…ôpitu tu bar~…ĺuwan. ańß…ôbat satu ku sakubad, tanaju satu ku banuńß r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° kib…ôtur~…ĺ. ańß…ôb…ôd satu mubańß…ôr~…ĺ. sisa tusa ku papir~…ĺian nuńß…ôni ¶a ¶aj ńßan ńßamawsa mapataj anu ¶aaj sa mikiŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° adada tu misabar~…ĺuńßaj a dadanan. *** . ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a batan a d…ômiadan amaŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °, mapataj mubańß…ôr~…ĺ tajdan i tunuńß nu buju. itini i t…ôpat…ôpadan sidibu, samuńßmuńßsa itida ¶aaj bańß…ôr~…ĺ. par~…ĺaŇč ńßan sajawaj u saŇču ¶ud kuajaw mituktuk tu ba Ē~ °tu, katukuńß tuni kańß…ôtik nu saŇču ¶ud. samuńßmuńß satu mińßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺ tunika r~…ĺutu ¶an nu saŇču ¶udan. . u bar~…ĺuńßaj tu asaŇču ¶ud ńßamaw ńßannida miŇču ¶Ňčus ku kanus mip…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °. mur~…ĺaŇčaw satu ku bar~…ĺuńßaj a kanusan, ńßamaw ńßantu nida ku banu ńßa ¶a ¶aj ńßannida mipu ¶pu ¶. katukuńß tu r~…ĺimaaj a bur~…ĺadan, mur~…ĺutu ¶ tu ku banuńß, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu kupar~…ĺaŇč mubańß…ôr~…ĺ. maudip satu kina ¶a ¶aj a ¶a maudip tu tur~…ĺuaj a bataan nuni kaudipan. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan
